metadata.name: User Forgot Password for Streaming Account

description: A user cannot log in to their streaming account because they have forgotten their password.

nodes.task_description: Identify the user by their email address.
Trigger a secure password reset link to be sent to the user's registered email address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the reset email.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the user to check their email and follow the instructions to set a new password.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear guidance to the user.
